topics.content:
💡 Why BDO works for Pinoys:

✓ BDO is trusted (biggest bank)
✓ Fast approval (3-5 days vs weeks elsewhere)
✓ Property-backed lending (more favorable terms)
✓ Rates competitive (5.5-6.5%)
✓ We handle documentation
✓ No hidden fees (BDO transparent)

If self-employed? Even better — BDO values real estate backing.

📤 Alternative: Use remittances!

If you have OFW family:
• Pool resources → One villa
• Split ownership (50-50)
• Shared income: PHP 197.5K each
• Multiple families doing this
• Collective wealth building
• Generational asset

Remit → BDO → Accumulate → Invest

🤝 Community standing:

• Property is secure (barangay knows location)
• Blue Everest maintains community relations
• Local staff employed (~5 people)
• Taxes paid locally
• Not a ghost property
• Barangay captain briefed

You're investing IN the community.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 For entrepreneurs:

Instead of:
❌ Bahay loan (5-10% interest only, no asset growth)

Consider:
✅ Villa investment (20% returns + asset ownership)

Same capital deployment, way better outcome.
Your children inherit property + wealth.

📋 In your Will:

Villa ownership is EASILY inheritable:
• Property in your name (simple)
• Income continues automatically
• Management transfers to heirs
• No probate complications
• Building family wealth
• Generational income stream

Your kids benefit for decades.

🏛️ Tax obligations (transparent):

✓ Income tax: On rental earnings (included in management)
✓ Capital gains: When you sell
✓ Annual property tax: ~2-3% (low)
✓ CPA assistance: Provided
✓ Reporting: Automated, we help
• No surprises
• Fully legal
• All documented
